title: Michael S Barr: Rural communities - worth the investment
body:
Speech by Mr Michael S Barr, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at "Strengthening America's economy through rural investment: a working forum", Washington DC, 14 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416h.htm

title: Michael S Barr: Brief remarks on stablecoins
body:
Speech by Mr Michael S Barr, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at "The GENIUS Act in practice: key questions for stablecoin regulation", The Federalist Society, Washington DC, 31 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260408b.htm

title: Michelle W Bowman: Supporting small businesses
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the CBA LIVE 26, organised by the Consumer Bankers Association, San Diego, California, 31 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260408a.htm

title: John C Williams: Ferrying through the crosscurrents
body:
Remarks by Mr John C Williams, President and Chief Executive Officer of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, at the Staten Island Economic Development Corporation, Staten Island, New York City, 30 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260407b.htm
